chunks.title: Warning at the Temple Gate
chunks.reason: Jeremiah delivers a unified oracle warning Judah against trusting in the temple while practicing injustice.

chunks.title: Call to Stop Interceding
chunks.reason: A specific instruction for Jeremiah to cease praying for the people due to their persistent idolatry.

chunks.title: Historical Rebuke and Covenant
chunks.reason: God argues against the priority of sacrifices by recalling the original covenant command to listen.

chunks.title: Judgment on Topheth and Jerusalem
chunks.reason: A prophetic declaration of the valley's renaming and the coming desolation of the land.
